creator: dsh@bamus.cz
text:
Created attachment 251778
mysql84-client.diff

Hi,

this patch fixes building of mysql84-client without SASLCLIENT:

pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mysql84-client/work/stage/usr/local/lib/mysql/plugin/authentication_ldap_sasl_client.so:No such file or directory

The same problem, like was in
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=277600
